sourcesContent:
import React, { useContext } from 'react'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import { AuthContext } from '../context/AuthContext'; const actionCards = [ { title: 'Book Slots', description: 'Schedule sessions with available staff members.', icon: 'Schedule', to: '/slots', }, { title: 'Chat', description: 'Discuss questions with staff in real time.', icon: 'Messages', to: '/chat', }, { title: 'Materials', description: 'Browse resources shared for your subjects.', icon: 'Resources', to: '/materials', }, { title: 'My Bookings', description: 'Track your upcoming and confirmed sessions.', icon: 'Bookings', to: '/slots?view=booked', }, ]; const StudentDashboard = () => { const { user } = useContext(AuthContext); return (

Welcome, {user?.name}

Plan sessions, connect with staff, and keep your learning resources organized.

{actionCards.map((card) => (
{card.icon}
{card.title}

{card.description}

))}
How to Use
  1. Review available staff slots and choose a suitable session.
  2. Book early to secure preferred timings.
  3. Use chat to clarify questions before or after a session.
  4. Refer to uploaded materials to prepare and revise efficiently.
Study Tips
  • Prepare your questions before each session to use time well.
  • Download or review materials in advance when available.
  • Keep track of bookings so you do not miss sessions.
  • Follow up in chat if you need clarification after a discussion.
); }; export default StudentDashboard;
